source.evidenceType: repository budget; current final-device measurements remain pending

budgets.metric: cold launch to first interactive frame
budgets.method: Instruments Launch template and Time Profiler using existing fixed signposts
budgets.samplePolicy: five clean cold launches; record every sample and require each sample within budget

budgets.method: Instruments Hangs and Hitches plus SwiftUI profiler
budgets.samplePolicy: three 30-second natural-scroll samples; record every sample

budgets.metric: reader previous/next/table-of-contents page transition latency, peak memory, and main-thread stalls
budgets.value: candidate p95 transition latency and peak memory no greater than current main, with zero stalls above 250 milliseconds and exact destination identity preserved
budgets.method: pinned iOS XCUITest with XCTOSSignpostMetric/XCTMemoryMetric plus Instruments Hangs trace and deterministic chapter fixtures
budgets.samplePolicy: capture current-main first, then candidate; 30 matched previous/next/table-of-contents transitions per required device class on the same OS, toolchain, fixture, and build configuration; retain every sample, xcresult, and trace

budgets.metric: concept-graph layout and interaction latency, peak memory, stale-work rejection, and main-thread stalls
budgets.value: candidate p95 layout and interaction latency and peak memory no greater than current main, stale work rejected, and zero stalls above 250 milliseconds
budgets.method: pinned iOS XCUITest with XCTOSSignpostMetric/XCTMemoryMetric plus Instruments Hangs trace and deterministic concept-graph fixtures
budgets.samplePolicy: capture current-main first, then candidate; 30 matched graph layout and interaction samples on the same compact-iPhone device, OS, toolchain, fixture, and build configuration; retain every sample, xcresult, and trace

budgets.metric: Home, Library, Search, and Discover scroll hitch duration rate
budgets.value: current-main p95 on the same device, OS, toolchain, fixture, and network profile
budgets.method: Instruments Hangs and Hitches plus SwiftUI profiler with fixed catalog fixtures
budgets.samplePolicy: capture current-main first, then candidate; three 30-second matched samples per surface and device class; retain all samples and require zero stalls above 250 milliseconds

budgets.metric: book-cover warm-cache latency, redundant-network count, and peak memory
budgets.value: candidate p95 latency and peak memory no greater than current main, with zero redundant warm-cache network loads and no reused-cell image mismatch
budgets.method: URLProtocol counter plus privacy-safe signposts, Instruments Allocations, and deterministic cell-reuse fixture
budgets.samplePolicy: capture current-main first, then candidate; 100 cold-to-warm transitions and three reuse-scroll repetitions per required device class

budgets.metric: library and reader open with one large book
budgets.samplePolicy: three clean repetitions; record peak resident memory for each
three clean repetitions; record peak resident memory for each

budgets.method: privacy-safe OSLog interval around the indexed cache-hit fetch
budgets.samplePolicy: 100 cache-hit fetches; p95 must meet budget and all raw samples are retained

budgets.method: Instruments Hangs during the declared central journey
budgets.samplePolicy: full journey on each required device class; retain the trace

budgets.value: candidate exported Energy Log metrics no worse than current main for the same steps and zero unexpected background activity after cancellation/sign-out
budgets.unit: Energy Log exported metrics and background activity count
budgets.method: Instruments Energy Log with fixed journey signposts and airplane/offline transition profile
budgets.samplePolicy: capture current-main first, then candidate; three matched full journeys on each required device class

budgets.metric: long-form narration memory slope, energy impact, and audio underrun/interruption recovery
budgets.value: candidate memory slope and exported energy metrics no worse than current main, zero retained superseded player graphs, and zero unrecovered underruns/interruption failures
budgets.unit: megabytesPerMinute, Energy Log exported metrics, count
budgets.method: 30-minute fixed narration fixture with Allocations, Leaks, Energy Log, route interruption, and background signposts
budgets.samplePolicy: capture current-main first, then candidate; two 30-minute runs on a current compact iPhone class with one declared route/interruption sequence per run

budgets.metric: download completion time, peak memory, energy impact, and resume integrity
budgets.value: candidate completion p95, peak memory, and exported energy metrics no worse than current main while resume/deletion/storage accounting remain exact
budgets.unit: seconds, megabytes, Energy Log exported metrics, integrity count
budgets.method: fixed-size nonprivate fixture on shaped Wi-Fi with URLSession metrics, Allocations, Energy Log, forced interruption, relaunch, and low-storage scenario
budgets.samplePolicy: capture current-main first, then candidate; five matched downloads plus three interruption/resume runs per required device class

changePolicy: Implementation lanes may tighten but never loosen or replace these budgets. A proposed relaxation is BLOCKED_OWNER_DECISION and requires a new reviewed planning revision with measured provenance before candidate work.
